'''Neona''' was a [[Temperature|temperate]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Freeworlds Territory]], populated by an [[Unidentified Neona species|indigenous sentient species]]. In [[19,997 BBY]], the planet experienced a period of intense geological warming that melted the ice caps and plunged the landmass below massive oceans, sparing only two ice-continents, one located at each pole. The native species was consumed by the tides and succumbed to extinction, leaving behind only extravagent ruins interred beneath the waves as proof of their existence.

Due to the lack of habitable landmass, Neona was not largely settled for many centuries and [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] lived in floating cities with a single [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] for the entire planet. That changed once [[Hanson Mining Consolidated]] surveyed the planet's sea floor, discovering large [[Ore/Legends|mineral]] deposits. The consortium of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies secured mining rights to the planet and settled the world with its resident-employees, placing them in undersea mines while towing the floating cities over the projects. Some were linked together or attached to new spaceports as in the case of [[Newland (city)|Newland]], a large city formed aroung the original spaceport that became the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]].

The various mining operations were highly lucrative and Hanson's subsidiaries paid their citizen-employees well. However, once the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Giju Run/Legends|Giju Run]] was established, intersecting with the [[Procopian Shipping Lane]] that passed by Neona, the planet became a popular real estate venture for the [[Tapani Noble Houses]]. This influx of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] weaned the planet off its economic dependancy on selling the variably-priced ore.

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell, the [[Pelagia Freedom Force]], maintained a [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] on Neona.

Neona was a voting member of the [[League of Tapani Freeworlds]].

In addition, Hanson monopolized the mining rights to several surrounding [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] with ore-rich planets not fit for [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] or settlement.

==Description==
Neona was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Neona system/Legends|Neona system]]. Located within the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Freeworlds Territory]], it had two barren [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. Due to a geologic warming period that melted the polar ice caps, the world's landmass was slowly engulfed in the rising tides. Only one ice-continent at each pole were spared, though the weather on both was cold and harsh, forcing what few settlers came to colonize the planet in floating cities with only one [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] for the whole planet. An extensive cave system sat on the southern continent and intricate ruins left behind by the planet's extinct [[Unidentified Neona species|sentient species]], riddled the undersea surface.

After [[Hanson Mining Consolidated]], a conglomerate of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporations, discovered the sea floor was rich in [[Ore/Legends|ore]] deposits and bought the mining rights to the world, it took governmental control of the territory. More floating cities were created to house their move-in citizen-employees and were linked with existing cities, relocated above the newly-constructed mines. Newland was one such collection of cities—centered around the original, no longer exclusive, spaceport—became the largest of all and was named the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]'', Neona is incorrectly referred to as "Leona" in one instance.
